title: Squirrel Removal in North Merrick, Long Island | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in North Merrick, NY. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Long Island. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels in your North Merrick attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout North Merrick and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion techniques to solve your squirrel problems quickly and effectively.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving North Merrick homeowners for years with proven squirrel removal solutions tailored to Long Island's unique wildlife challenges. Our team offers same-day emergency service, warranties on exclusion work, and competitive pricing from $900-$2,500 depending on the severity of your infestation.
localContext: North Merrick's tree-lined residential streets and proximity to parks like Cammann's Pond and Norman J. Levy Park & Preserve create ideal habitats for squirrels that frequently seek shelter in home attics and soffits. The area's mix of mid-century ranch homes and split-levels often have vulnerable entry points that squirrels exploit during nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in North Merrick typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or insulation replacement is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What time of year are squirrels most active in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Squirrels in North Merrick are most active during spring (March-May) and fall (September-November) when they're seeking nesting sites and storing food for winter. However, squirrels can invade homes year-round, especially during extreme weather when they seek warmth and shelter.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods are completely humane and comply with all New York State wildlife regulations. We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, then relocate them according to local ordinances and seal all entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How long does the squirrel removal process take?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in North Merrick are completed within 3-7 days, though complex cases may take up to two weeks. The timeline depends on the number of squirrels, accessibility of entry points, and whether babies are present. We'll provide a specific timeline during your free inspection.
